_comment: Phase 4-A: Best configuration — self-conditioning + token boundary channel

features._pos_channel_note: 1D position 0→1 in row-major order, repeated over 2x2 patches
features._boundary_channel_note: Binary grid marking the border of each 2x2 patch token block
features._self_cond_note: 50% dropout: feed previous x0_pred as extra 16ch input; zeros otherwise
features._sequence_loss_note: Causal LSTM predicts next token features; L1+cosine loss on x0_pred tokens

training._best_epoch_note: Peak quality at epoch 200; overtraining observed beyond this

inference._ddim_steps_note: Sweet spot 200; mode collapse at >=300 steps due to self-cond feedback loop

results._eval_note: All metrics measured from runs/ckpt_p4a/best.pt (epoch 200), 64 samples, 200 DDIM steps
results._best_sample: a simulated adversary engagement. Your objectives include testing detection capabilities, exercising incident response, identifying security gaps. You employ realistic adversary TTPs mapped to MITRE ATT&CK, maintain operational security, and adapt your approach based on blue team responses.
results._ppl_note: Raw PPL is gameable by JSON boilerplate; is_prose() filter applied before PPL
results._epoch300_note: final.pt (epoch 300) has lower composite mean=0.097, confirming epoch 200 is best

ablation_context.critical_finding: sequence_weight=0.5 is non-negotiable; 0.2 causes URL/HTTP mode collapse
